title: DNA extraction protocol for saliva samples obtained from Omigene oral OM device using the Qiagen QiaAMP Powerfecal DNA kit for shotgun metagenomic sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5ae8d","text":"This protocol describes the procedure for DNA extraction of saliva samples using the Omnigene OM device and the Qiagen QiaMP Powerfecal DNA PRO kit for shotgun metagenomic sequencing. steps: Visit the protocols.io for saliva sampling : https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.n92ldm8qol5b/v1
Heat the whole OMNIgene Oral OM 501 tubes into an incubator at 50 °C for 2 h.
